longDescription:
Give it one scene description and it produces a short, multi-shot video with a consistent look across shots. An LLM (`models.run`) writes a style guide and breaks the scene into an ordered shot list, then image and video generation turn that plan into finished clips.

The work runs as a durable pipeline. It makes all the keyframe images at once, then animates them one clip at a time: each video job runs in the background and the workflow pauses until a webhook says the clip is ready. Running the clips in sequence keeps a paused step always waiting before its job can finish. When every clip is collected, a merge job stitches them into a single video.

Set `dryRun` and it stops right after planning, returning the shot list without generating anything.

This is the priciest template in the gallery. A full run pays for one LLM call, one image per shot, one image-to-video clip per shot, and the merge job — so start with a small `numShots`. The plan-only run costs just the one LLM call.
useCases: Turn a story or scene idea into a short, multi-shot video that keeps one style across shots.
Prototype an ad, teaser, or social clip from a one-line brief.
Plan the shot list first with dryRun, then run the full pipeline once you like it.
notes:
Click **Use this template** — Sapiom builds and deploys it for you, then run it from the workflow page. Your $5 signup credit covers first runs.

`scene` is the only required input. Set `dryRun: true` to stop after planning and see the shot list without paying for any images or video. A full run is the priciest in the gallery — it bills the LLM plan, one image per shot, one image-to-video clip per shot, and a merge job — so keep `numShots` small (default 3, max 6). It animates one shot at a time and picks up each finished clip on its own; you don't send any signal. It defaults to Kling 2.1 Pro for the video; pass a cheaper `model` (a Wan or Seedance image-to-video id) to trade quality for cost.

Prefer to work from the code? Run it locally with `run_local` and `{ "dryRun": true }` to trace the whole graph for free, or edit and deploy it with the Sapiom MCP.

input.scene: a paper boat drifting down a rain-soaked city gutter at night

output.bible: Moody neo-noir night scene: a small white paper boat on dark rain-slicked asphalt, amber streetlight reflections, shallow depth of field, 35mm anamorphic look, cool blue shadows.

shots.image_prompt: Moody neo-noir night scene... Close-up of the paper boat entering a flooded gutter, raindrops rippling the surface.
shots.motion_prompt: The paper boat; drifts into frame on the current; slow push-in; 6s; amber streetlight; anamorphic neo-noir.

input.scene: a paper boat drifting down a rain-soaked city gutter at night
